/usr/bin/f95 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/semba-fdtd.dir/link.d -fopenmp -ffree-form -ffree-line-length-none -fdec -fallow-argument-mismatch "CMakeFiles/semba-fdtd.dir/src_main_pub/launcher.F90.o" -o bin/semba-fdtd  lib/libsemba-main.a lib/libsemba-reports.a lib/libsemba-outputs.a lib/libsemba-components.a lib/libsmbjson.a lib/libjsonfortran.a lib/libconformal.a lib/libmtlnsolver.a lib/libsemba-reports.a lib/libsemba-types.a lib/libfhash.a /home/runner/work/fdtd/fdtd/precompiled_libraries/linux-gcc/lapack/liblapack.a /home/runner/work/fdtd/fdtd/precompiled_libraries/linux-gcc/lapack/libblas.a lib/libngspice_interface.a lib/libngspice.a lib/libngspice-spicelib.a lib/libngspice-maths.a lib/libngspice-maths-klu.a lib/libngspice-maths-sparse.a lib/libngspice-maths-klu-float.a lib/libngspice-maths-klu-complex.a lib/libngspice-xspice.a -lstdc++
